name: FinPilot
updateContentCommand: sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) /opt/venv /opt/app 2>/dev/null; [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; python3 -m venv /opt/venv && /opt/venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && /opt/venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt && /opt/venv/bin/pip install streamlit && echo '✅ venv ready'; cp -a . /opt/app/ && echo '✅ App files synced to /opt/app (overlay FS)'

postAttachCommand.server: cd /opt/app && /opt/venv/bin/streamlit run panel_new.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false --server.headless true
